{{Infobox construct
| name = Flesh-warped Soldier
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Flesh-warped Soldiers are humanoid lumps of purplish flesh produced by the [[Ulethian Empire]].}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Flesh-warped Soldiers consume organic material to add to their own bodies and can split into duplicates.}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
